title: rosa multiflora var. adenochaeta
intro: Rosa multiflora var. adenochaeta, also known as the fragrant rose or Japanese rose, is a type of flowering shrub native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rosa multiflora var. adenochaeta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
